title: Crystal Flow
description: ⚡ Instant inventory sorting built for CPvP speed, clutch moments, and time efficiency.
body:
# 💎 CrystalPvP Inv Sorter

![Preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/82d8a5be2f0e08b8980ae6826ac22aac9f15c348.jpeg)

**CrystalPvP Inv Sorter** is a fast, lightweight inventory sorting mod built for **Crystal PvP players** and competitive gameplay.

Stop wasting time dragging items mid-fight.

> ⚡ **One keypress → Perfect inventory → Full control**

---

## 🚀 Features

![Preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a915a771b9f90836a1d332e26321c180ede7a702.png)

- ⚡ **One-Press Sorting**  
  Instantly sorts hotbar, inventory, armor, and offhand  

- 🧠 **Custom Layout Profiles**  
  Keep your PvP setup consistent every fight  

- 🛡 **Auto Armor & Offhand**  
  Automatically places items in correct slots  

- 🎯 **CPvP Optimized**  
  Built for fast-paced crystal combat  

- 🪶 **Lightweight & Fast**  
  No lag, no FPS drops  

---

## ⚔ Why Use This?

> In Crystal PvP, **inventory speed = survival**

- ⚔ Faster reactions  
- ⏱ Save clutch seconds  
- 🧠 Consistent loadouts  
- 🎮 Focus on fighting, not sorting  

---

## ⚙ Compatibility

- ✔ Minecraft **1.21+**  
- ✔ **Fabric Loader**  
- ✔ 100% **Client-Side**  

---

## ⚠ Notes

- 🐛 Sort may require **2–3 key presses** *(temporary issue)*  
- 🔐 Some servers may restrict inventory mods → use responsibly  

---

## 🔮 Future Updates

- ⚙ Advanced sorting profiles  
- 🎛 Config menu  
- ⚡ Faster sorting system
